embeddableConfig.content: ### NOTE: If you are on ECH deployments, please enable Logs and Metrics first following [this guide](https://www.elastic.co/docs/deploy-manage/monitor/stack-monitoring/ece-ech-stack-monitoring#enable-logging-and-monitoring-steps). If you are shipping the metrics to a separate deployment, the deployment will need to enable APM package to install this dashboard.

embeddableConfig.description: Creation and Destruction events for Elasticsearch indexers
embeddableConfig.title: Elasticsearch Indexers Lifecycle
